results.title: Spain Folds, Agrees to Boost NATO Payments After U.S. Trade Halt Order
results.description: President Donald Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One that Spain “came back all the way” and agreed to boost NATO payments after he ordered a U.S. trade embargo with the European country over its reluctance to contribute more to the organization. results.title: The Platner Problem: Is Political Vetting Broken?
results.description: The vetting process for political candidates has been brought into sharp focus after Graham Platner suspended his Senate campaign in Maine following multiple alarming allegations, including an alleged rape.
